name: dnd-context-budget
description: dnd-context-budget. Token injection manager — caps total prompt injection size and drops low-priority context when over budget. Run this at the lowest priority so it acts as a final gate after all other plugins have injected.
author: Leona (Zeebie), with the help of Remmi for debugging

char_budget.description: Maximum total character budget for all injected context. ~1500 tokens at 4 chars/token.

warn_at_percent.description: Log a warning when injected context exceeds this % of the budget.
